creator: satosi.kimura@nifty.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 178467
patch for sbcl 1.3.13

 I can install latest sbcl (1.3.13) to FreeBSD/amd64 10.3

1. modify original files in ports/sbcl and make
 Same as sbcl 1.3.9.

2. check by portlint
 Same output as sbcl 1.3.9 to 1.3.12.

3. check by poudriere
 See sbcl-1.3.13,1.log shown as attachment.
